title: Xenial Buttery Middle Eastern Scamorza Flatbread
description: A buttery and molten Middle Eastern dish featuring scamorza, pickle, and ovo-vegetarian friendly ingredients, perfect for a cozy meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Butter each piece of flatbread on both sides.
Place the flatbread on a baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes.
Top each flatbread with a slice of scamorza cheese and return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
While the flatbread is baking, mix together the sumac, paprika, and garlic powder in a small bowl.
Sprinkle the spice mixture over the cheese.
Top each flatbread with a fried egg and a few slices of pickle.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the top of each flatbread.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
